channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/7)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯里，关于 AI 编程和智能体（Agent）的讨论特别多，感觉整个社区都在围绕这个主题转。我帮你挑出了几件最值得关注的事：首先是几个开源的 AI 编程工具火了，比如能替代 Claude Code 的 OpenClaude，还有号称“开源泄露版”的 ClaudeCode。其次，关于如何用好这些工具（比如 vibe coding）的实践讨论也很多，看来大家已经从“尝鲜”进入“深度使用”阶段了。另外，一些关于 AI 职业发展的讨论也值得一看，反映了行业的一些真实变化。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯里，关于 AI 编程和智能体（Agent）的讨论特别多，感觉整个社区都在围绕这个主题转。我帮你挑出了几件最值得关注的事：首先是几个开源的 AI 编程工具火了，比如能替代 Claude Code 的 OpenClaude，还有号称“开源泄露版”的 ClaudeCode。其次，关于如何用好这些工具（比如 vibe coding）的实践讨论也很多，看来大家已经从“尝鲜”进入“深度使用”阶段了。另外，一些关于 AI 职业发展的讨论也值得一看，反映了行业的一些真实变化。

item.title: Gitlawb/openclaude
item.description: Open Claude Is Open-source coding-agent CLI for OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, Codex, GitHub Models, and 200+ models via OpenAI-compatible APIs. | 近期热门 | 总 18154 stars
item.author: Gitlawb

item.title: santifer/career-ops
item.description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing. | 近期热门 | 总 11831 stars
item.author: santifer

item.title: ultraworkers/claw-code-parity
item.description: Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd / claw-code Rust port parity work - it is temporary work while claw-code repo is doing migration | 近期热门 | 总 6555 stars
item.author: ultraworkers

item.title: HKUDS/OpenHarness
item.description: "OpenHarness: Open Agent Harness" | 近期热门 | 总 6450 stars
item.author: HKUDS

item.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
item.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman | 近期热门 | 总 4314 stars
item.author: JuliusBrussee

item.title: kevinrgu/autoagent
item.description: autonomous harness engineering | 近期热门 | 总 3607 stars
item.author: kevinrgu

item.title: soongenwong/claudecode
item.description: Open Source ClaudeCode Leaked. Same functionalities as Claude Code by Anthropic. Written in Rust, Ready to use immediately for free. | 近期热门 | 总 792 stars
item.author: soongenwong

item.title: Paidax01/math-curve-loaders
item.description: A lightweight gallery of mathematical curve based loading animations with modal previews, formulas, and copyable code snippets. | 近期热门 | 总 380 stars
item.author: Paidax01

item.title: abhishekgahlot2/toon-json-render
item.description: Drop-in TOON adapter for json-render - fewer LLM tokens, no new language | 近期热门 | 总 53 stars
item.author: abhishekgahlot2
